VersionInfo.Title: Markdown Monster 4.2 is now available
VersionInfo.Detail: Version 4.2 adds many enhancements: * Improved Preview Syncing * Context aware LLM Chat Interface * AI Ghost Text Suggestions * AI Summaries, Text Cleanup and Tranlation * Many Mermaid Improvements * Mermaid, Python and C++ Inline Syntax Coloring * New Document Link Checker * plus [much more...](https://github.com/RickStrahl/MarkdownMonster/blob/main/Changelog.md)
